name: net_connection_win_wuauclt_network_connection
raw_query: any where (process.executable:"*wuauclt*" and winlog.event_data.CommandLine:"* /RunHandlerComServer*") and (not ((cidrMatch(destination.ip, "127.0.0.0/8") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "10.0.0.0/8") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "169.254.0.0/16") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "172.16.0.0/12") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "192.168.0.0/16") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "::1/128") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "fe80::/10") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "fc00::/7")) or (cidrMatch(destination.ip, "20.184.0.0/13") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "20.192.0.0/10") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "23.79.0.0/16") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "51.10.0.0/15") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "51.103.0.0/16") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "51.104.0.0/15") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "52.224.0.0/11")) or (winlog.event_data.CommandLine like~ ("*:\\Windows\\UUS\\Packages\\Preview\\amd64\\updatedeploy.dll /ClassId*", "*:\\Windows\\UUS\\amd64\\UpdateDeploy.dll /ClassId*")) or (winlog.event_data.CommandLine:"*:\\Windows\\WinSxS\\*" and winlog.event_data.CommandLine:"*\\UpdateDeploy.dll /ClassId *") or (?winlog.event_data.CommandLine == null) or winlog.event_data.CommandLine==""))
